articles.title: Heatwave Impact: Summer Holidays Extended! - Sakshi Education
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Karnataka
articles.full_text:
Osmania University has extended summer holidays by one week due to intense heat conditions. Degree and PG classes will now commence from June 8, 2026.
In view of the prevailing high temperatures and intense summer conditions, Osmania University has extended the summer vacation for its students by an additional week. The decision has been taken considering the severe heat conditions affecting the region.
According to university officials, the summer holidays, which were originally scheduled to conclude on June 1, 2026, have now been extended until June 7, 2026. As per the revised schedule, Degree and Postgraduate (PG) classes will resume from June 8, 2026.
The extension is expected to provide relief to thousands of students who would otherwise have been required to return to campuses amid soaring temperatures. Students are advised to keep track of any further announcements issued by the university administration regarding academic activities and class schedules.
Key Highlights
- Osmania University extends summer vacation by one week.
- Earlier holiday period ended on June 1, 2026.
- Revised vacation period continues until June 7, 2026.
- Degree and PG classes will commence from June 8, 2026.
- Decision taken considering the prevailing heatwave conditions.
Students are advised to make necessary travel and accommodation arrangements based on the revised academic schedule.
